name: Case Resolution Orchestrator (12-engine pipeline, SL is Phase 3.5)
what_it_solves: Top-level pipeline that composes the 12 engines into a single CaseResolution.
how_it_solves: `Orchestrator.resolve_case(patient_state) -> CaseResolution` sequences the engines; SL runs as Phase 3.5 after upstream biomarker + mechanism engines have populated the state.
why_it_exists: Single choke-point for cross-cutting concerns: audit trail, RUO middleware, tier clamps, POLE guard, underpowered guard.
